name: BuilderPluginConfig
description: Configuration for the drag-and-drop website builder plugin.

attributes.name: initialConfig
attributes.description: Seed grid config used to hydrate the canvas.

attributes.name: readOnly
attributes.description: When true, render the built site as a read-only viewer (navbar, navigation and content only) with no editing toolbar, palette or inspector.

attributes.name: editorRoles
attributes.description: Role names allowed to edit. When set, users whose current role is not listed get the read-only viewer. Empty or absent means editing is open to everyone.

attributes.name: directoryUrl
attributes.description: URL to navigate to when clicking the 'Website builder' breadcrumb (e.g. the site directory page). Falls back to window.history.back() when omitted.
